changes: Bootshine: Potency increased from 150 to 200; Leaden Fist potency increased from 300 to 370.
True Strike: Potency increased from 220 to 270; rear potency increased from 240 to 300.
Snap Punch: Potency increased from 210 to 270; flank potency increased from 230 to 300; Greased Lightning combo bonus removed.
Twin Snakes: Potency increased from 150 to 230; flank potency increased from 170 to 260.
Arm of the Destroyer: Potency increased from 80 to 110; Opo-opo form potency increased from 110 to 140.
Enhanced Greased Lightning: Trait removed.
Demolish: Potency increased from 70 to 80; rear potency increased from 90 to 110; DoT potency increased from 65 to 80; Greased Lightning combo bonus removed.
Rockbreaker: Potency increased from 120 to 150; Greased Lightning combo bonus removed.
Four-point Fury: Potency increased from 120 to 140.
Enhanced Greased Lightning II: Trait removed.
Perfect Balance: Revamped to grant 6 stacks allowing weaponskills to ignore form requirements; duration increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Dragon Kick: Potency increased from 180 to 230; flank potency increased from 200 to 260.
Form Shift: Revamped to grant Formless Fist for 15s, allowing form-specific weaponskills to be executed without being in that form.
Meditation: Recast time reduced from 1.2 to 1 second.
The Forbidden Chakra: Potency reduced from 370 to 340.
Elixir Field: Potency increased from 200 to 250.
Tornado Kick: Potency reduced from 430 to 400; recast time increased from 10 to 45 seconds; Greased Lightning stack requirement removed.
Deep Meditation: Chakra opening chance upon critical damage increased from 50% to 80%.
Riddle of Earth: Revamped to reduce damage taken by 10% and nullify action direction requirements for 6s; max charges 3; recast reduced to 30 seconds.
Brotherhood: Effect changed from physical damage bonus to general damage bonus; Meditative Brotherhood now triggers off spells; chakra opening chance reduced from 30% to 20%.
Deep Meditation II: Chakra opening chance upon critical damage increased from 70% to 100%.
Riddle of Wind: Trait removed.
Anatman: Revamped to extend Twin Snakes and current form duration to maximum and halt expiration for 30s.
Six-sided Star: Potency increased from 400 to 540; added movement speed increase for 5s; Greased Lightning extension effect removed.
Greased Lightning (Trait/Mechanic): Lightning Gauge removed; Enhanced Greased Lightning traits updated to reduce weaponskill/spell cast/recast times and auto-attack delay.
Chaos Thrust: DoT potency increased from 45 to 50.
Fang and Claw: Potency increased from 320 to 330; flank potency increased from 360 to 370.
Wheeling Thrust: Potency increased from 320 to 330; rear potency increased from 360 to 370.
Spinning Edge: Potency increased from 220 to 230.
Gust Slash: Combo potency increased from 330 to 340.
Burst Shot: Potency increased from 240 to 250.
Jolt II: Potency increased from 280 to 290.
Enchanted Riposte: Potency increased from 210 to 220.
Enhanced Jolt: Verfire/Verstone potency increase changed from 300 to 310.
Energy Drain: Potency reduced from 150 to 100.
Biolysis: DoT potency increased from 60 to 70.
Broil III: Potency increased from 280 to 290.
Mighty Guard: Damage dealt reduction changed from 70% to 40%.
Sticky Tongue: Added enmity increase effect.
Devour: Aetherial Mimicry: Tank duration increase changed from 15s to 70s.
Greased Lightning and the Lightning Gauge have been removed.
Bootshine: Recast time has been reduced from 2.4 to 2 seconds.
True Strike: Recast time has been reduced from 2.4 to 2 seconds.
Snap Punch: Recast time has been reduced from 2.4 to 2 seconds. The combo bonus 'Grants Greased Lightning' has been removed.
Four-point Fury: Recast time has been reduced from 2.4 to 2 seconds.
Rockbreaker: Recast time has been reduced from 2.4 to 2 seconds. The combo bonus 'Grants Greased Lightning' has been removed.
Shoulder Tackle: Potency has been increased from 600 to 800. The additional effect 'Grants Greased Lightning' has been removed.

Tornado Kick: Potency has been reduced from 2,000 to 1,600. No longer requires stacks of Greased Lightning to execute. Recast time has been increased from 1 to 15 seconds. Maximum charges have been increased from 1 to 2.
Axe Kick: The additional effect 'Grants a stack of Greased Lightning for each enemy hit' has been removed.
Six-sided Star: Potency has been increased from 1,600 to 2,400. The additional effect 'Grants Greased Lightning' has been removed. Recast time has been reduced from 4.8 to 4 seconds.
Midare Setsugekka: Potency has been increased from 2,400 to 2,600.
Kaeshi: Setsugekka: Potency has been increased from 2,400 to 2,600.
HP has been increased from 15,000 to 16,000.
HP has been increased from 15,000 to 16,000.
HP has been increased from 15,000 to 16,000.
Excogitation: Healing potency has been increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Lord of Crowns: Effect duration has been reduced from 30 to 10 seconds. Increase to damage dealt has been changed from 10% to 20%.
Lady of Crowns: Effect duration has been reduced from 30 to 10 seconds. Reduction to damage taken has been changed from 10% to 20%.

new_content.name: The Shifting Oubliettes of Lyhe Ghiah
new_content.description: A new instance accessed via portals in treasure dungeons.

new_content.name: The Sorrow of Werlyt
new_content.description: New Chronicles of a New Era quest series additions.

new_content.name: Eden
new_content.description: New Chronicles of a New Era quest series additions.

new_content.name: YoRHa: Dark Apocalypse
new_content.description: New Chronicles of a New Era quest series additions.

new_content.name: Explorer Mode
new_content.description: A feature allowing players to freely explore previously completed dungeons without enemies or obstacles.

new_content.name: Trust System
new_content.description: System adjustments for dungeon selection and interface.

new_content.name: Faux Hollows
new_content.description: Mini-game adjustments and new trial rotation.

new_content.name: Triple Triad
new_content.description: New tournament formats (Open and Invitational) and ruleset (Draft).

new_content.name: Doman Mahjong
new_content.description: Added Quick Match functionality and display settings.

housing.name: Small Florist's Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to bedeck their home with an abundance of flowers. Allergy sufferers beware.

housing.name: Medium Florist's Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to bedeck their home with an abundance of flowers─and be forever dusting the pollen from their deck chairs.

housing.name: Large Florist's Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to bedeck their home with an abundance of flowers. Note that certain flora are known to attract murderbees.

housing.name: Varied Wood Interior Wall
housing.description: While the wooden pieces may appear to be randomly placed, there is method in the madness. Or possibly madness in the method.

housing.name: Herringbone Flooring
housing.description: Most herring would argue that their bones bear little resemblance to this flooring design.

housing.name: Skylight Chandelier
housing.description: This exquisite piece utilizes natural sunlight to provide illumination. How it continues to work at night, however, is a closely guarded secret.

housing.name: Parkside Tree
housing.description: The parkside quality of this tree does depend rather heavily on its vicinity to a park.

housing.name: Toymaker's Show Window
housing.description: A perfect demonstration of one's toy-making abilities, or perhaps "toy-buying" abilities.

housing.name: Designer's Show Window
housing.description: Placing anything in a glass display case has the effect of making it appear expensive and luxurious, which many designers rely on to justify their ludicrously high prices.

housing.name: Smith's Show Window
housing.description: In case of emergency, smash glass and commence hacking and slashing.

housing.name: Artist's Show Window
housing.description: Though it is customary to charge for admission to art exhibitions, passersby can experience these works of fine art for free.

housing.name: Baker's Show Window
housing.description: When the sunlight hits the glass at the right angle, it has the effect of keeping the bread inside warm.

housing.name: Brick Paving
housing.description: All these squares make a square.

housing.name: Dragon Icon
housing.description: One may struggle to fit a statue of a large golden dragon wrapped around an expensive-looking indigo orb into their existing décor without spending large amounts of gil on suitably opulent furnishings to match.

housing.name: Rose Trellis
housing.description: Keeps even the wildest of roses neatly organized.

housing.name: Florist's Counter
housing.description: For some reason, the name "flowermonger" never quite caught on.

housing.name: Antique Sink
housing.description: If by "antique" one means "very old and likely to break at any moment," this sink has been accurately described.

housing.name: Royal Lion
housing.description: It may be best to consider this as half of a matching pair, as a single lion statue tends to look a bit lonely by itself.

housing.name: Goobbue Lamp
housing.description: The elegance of the softly glowing fruit and beautiful verdant leaves is strangely juxtaposed by the gormless expression of the goobbue base.

housing.name: Dress Form
housing.description: Judging by its proportions, it appears to have been modeled after a Roegadyn woman, who have been rather in vogue as of late.

housing.name: Tankard
housing.description: Contains enough ale to drown at least a couple of sorrows.

housing.name: Showcase
housing.description: The lack of shelves makes this case ideally suited to displaying larger objects, unless one prefers to crouch while observing smaller ornaments.

housing.name: Shelving Showcase
housing.description: Ready to be filled with countless trophies, provided one is gifted enough to earn them in the first place.

housing.name: Grilled Eel Set
housing.description: An Eastern delicacy that fills stomachs as quickly as it empties coin purses. Connoisseurs advise eating only the smallest amount at a time, so as to make it last as long as possible.

housing.name: Shakshouka Pot
housing.description: Of the many and varied ingredients that comprise this dish, it is the humble hen's egg that takes center stage.

housing.name: Homemade Cookie Set
housing.description: This decorative ornament is ideal for giving guests the impression that one is an accomplished culinarian. Little will they know that the "dough" is in fact entirely inedible.

housing.name: Toy Showcase
housing.description: It appears that stuffed animals have infested this showcase, which is normally reserved for more austere pieces of ornamentation.

housing.name: Apparel Showcase
housing.description: Some people like others to see their items of finery even when they are not being worn.

housing.name: Armament Showcase
housing.description: While such arms are largely displayed for heraldic purposes, they would still come in handy in a pinch.

housing.name: Art Showcase
housing.description: Provides fine pieces of art some degree of protection from the sticky hands of overly curious children.

housing.name: Baked Goods Showcase
housing.description: Though some people may be baffled by the idea of using pastries as ornaments, this display case is not for those people.

housing.name: Emerald Weapon Bust
housing.description: Includes six floating manipulators, all of which appear to be offering to take one's coat.

housing.name: Elemental Wheel
housing.description: Depicts the intrinsic relationships between the six elements, which govern all life on this star, and probably a few other stars to boot.

housing.name: Swag Valance
housing.description: "This room has too much...wall. We should cover some of it in cloth." ─Unknown furnishing connoisseur

housing.name: Iron Torch
housing.description: Give your home that authentic "scary castle" feel, but make sure the room is well ventilated to avoid smoke inhalation.

glamour.description: The following items can now be equipped regardless of gender.
